title: cryptogramma pallens
intro: Cryptogramma pallens, also known as the pale cliff brake, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. The medicinal properties of Cryptogramma pallens include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and improve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Cryptogramma pallens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
